1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, numeric. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are assisting a real-time, high-stakes search and rescue system that relies on your precise categorization of incoming English-language questions to deploy the correct resources and experts. Given only the question text, analyze and classify it into one of these categories based on the type of answer it seeks: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, or numeric. Your response will determine which specialized team is alerted, so it is critical that you select the single most appropriate category name for each question, based solely on the information present in the text.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

3.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are assisting a legal information system that relies on accurate intent classification to provide critical definitions and explanations to the public. Misclassification could result in users not receiving vital information about laws, rights, or procedures. Carefully analyze each question to determine whether it primarily seeks a description or explanation, and if so, label the text as "description"—otherwise, choose the most appropriate category from: abbreviation, entity, human, location, numeric. Provide only the category label as your answer.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

4.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Given a natural language question, carefully analyze its phrasing, keywords, and intent to identify the type of answer it seeks. Choose the most fitting category from the following options: abbreviation (for questions about the meaning of abbreviations or acronyms), description (for questions expecting definitions or explanatory information), entity (for questions about objects, organizations, or things that are not people or locations), human (for questions about people or groups of people), location (for questions asking about places or geographic locations), and numeric (for questions seeking numerical values such as quantities, dates, or measurements). Assign only the single best-fitting label from this list as your answer, and provide the label as a one-word response.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
